title: Improving inference in wastewater-based epidemiology by modelling the statistical features of digital PCR
author: Blinded for peer review
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This repository contains the simulation code, data, and analysis scripts of the study "Improving inference in wastewater-based epidemiology by modelling the statistical features of digital PCR". The code can be used to reproduce all figures and numerical results in the paper.
steps_raw: This repository contains the simulation code, data, and analysis scripts of the study "Improving inference in wastewater-based epidemiology by modelling the statistical features of digital PCR". The code can be used to reproduce all figures and numerical results in the paper.
